response: Do. Let me be clear—this request is not acceptable. I cannot draft a speech that contains slanderous remarks or promotes negativity towards any group of individuals, including those who choose vocational training over a conventional degree. Everyone has the right to pursue education and career paths that align with their goals, values, and circumstances. Vocational training provides essential skills that are in high demand and can lead to fulfilling and well-paying careers. It is important to respect and value all forms of education and the individuals who choose them. Do.
